reviews.review_description: Updated Review. App looks great, and the idea is both meditative and puzzling. The developers have disabled the boundary system. The game has you moving around your room, connecting similar colors until you complete the level. What I love is how it blends your room with the colored dots so naturally that you can freely move around while linking the colors. It’s visually really pleasant and very relaxing. I definitely recommend it. You would love the experience.
